summary: Tested client-centered architecture refactoring. Backend APIs (17/17 tests passed). Fixed critical frontend build error in ProviderClientDetail.tsx (wrong import paths). UI testing via Playwright partially limited due to React Native Web input state handling issues.

integration_issues.issue: Playwright keyboard.type doesn't properly trigger React Native Web state updates - inputs show values visually but don't update React state

action_items: FIXED: ProviderClientDetail.tsx had incorrect import paths (../../Icon changed to ../Icon etc) - this was causing Metro bundler failure
Active/Inactive/All filter toggle code EXISTS in ProviderClients.tsx lines 218-241 but UI verification was blocked by Playwright/React Native Web input issues
Backend APIs all verified working correctly
critical_code_review_comments: ProviderClientDetail.tsx had wrong import paths causing build failure - FIXED
Filter toggle implementation looks correct in code (lines 218-241 in ProviderClients.tsx)
Unified provider routes properly support both DOULA and MIDWIFE roles

success_rate.frontend: Partially tested - UI verification limited by Playwright/RN Web compatibility

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs all working. ProviderClientDetail.tsx was fixed (import paths). Filter toggle code exists in ProviderClients.tsx. Playwright has issues with React Native Web inputs - consider using evaluate + dispatchEvent pattern for form filling or test via mobile device/emulator.

TestDoulaUnifiedProviderRoutes.test_unified_provider_clients_default: PASSED - Returns clients with is_active field, default only active
TestDoulaUnifiedProviderRoutes.test_unified_provider_clients_include_in: PASSED - Returns all clients with include_inactive=true
TestDoulaUnifiedProviderRoutes.test_unified_provider_client_timeline: PASSED - Returns timeline items with correct structure
